response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical expertise in developer tools, testing infrastructure, and full-stack development, with notable contributions to open-source projects and tooling. While his people-management experience is limited, his technical leadership and hands-on contributions to engineering productivity tools align well with the role's focus areas.
strengths: Extensive experience with developer tools, testing frameworks, and build systems (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, Trial, GISCollective).
Proven technical leadership in open-source projects and cross-functional collaboration (e.g., workshops, talks, and contributions to AI-agent infrastructure).
Diverse technical background spanning mobile, web, and embedded systems, with a focus on testability and user experience.
concerns: Limited explicit people-management experience (only 1-2 years inferred from team leadership roles).
No direct experience with mobile-platform ecosystems (a preferred but not required skill).
Lacks a formal advanced degree in computer science (preferred but not required).
